languages.text: {n}Эоганн гулко смеется, словно вы рассказали забавную небылицу.{/n} "Абсурд, {name}! Как он может быть мертв, если я вижу его перед собой, чувствую его в себе? Да, Нунциус, я так и сказал {mf|ему|ей} — ты жив, мы оба живы! Это — неопровержимый факт".

{n}Eogunn lets out a rumbling laugh, as if you had told some ridiculous lie.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! How can he be dead if I can see him before me, feel him within me? Yes, Nuncius, that's what I told {mf|him|her} — you are alive, we are both alive! This is an incontrovertible fact."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн гулко смеется, словно вы рассказали забавную небылицу.{/n} "Абсурд, {name}! Как он может быть мертв, если я вижу его перед собой, чувствую его в себе? Да, Нунциус, я так и сказал {mf|ему|ей} — ты жив, мы оба живы! Это — неопровержимый факт".

Yes, Nuncius, that's what I told {mf|him|her} — you are alive, we are both alive! This is an incontrovertible fact."

{n}Eogunn lets out a rumbling laugh, as if you had told some ridiculous lie.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! How can he be dead if I can see him before me, feel him within me? Yes, Nuncius, that's what I told {mf|him|her} — you are alive, we are both alive! This is an incontrovertible fact."

{n}Eogunn lets out a rumbling laugh, as if you had told some ridiculous lie.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! How can he be dead if I can see him before me, feel him within me? Yes, Nuncius, that's what I told {mf|him|her} — you are alive, we are both alive! This is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn suelta una sonora carcajada, como si hubieras contado una mentira ridícula.{/n} «¡Eso es absurdo, {name}! ¿Cómo va a estar muerto si puedo verlo delante de mí y sentirlo en mi interior? Sí, Nuncius, se lo acabo de decir: está vivo, ¡los dos lo estamos! Es un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a rumbling laugh, as if you had told some ridiculous lie.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! How can he be dead if I can see him before me, feel him within me? Yes, Nuncius, that's what I told {mf|him|her} — you are alive, we are both alive! This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn suelta una sonora carcajada, como si hubieras contado una mentira ridícula.{/n} «¡Eso es absurdo, {name}! ¿Cómo va a estar muerto si puedo verlo delante de mí y sentirlo en mi interior? Sí, Nuncius, se lo acabo de decir: está vivo, ¡los dos lo estamos! Es un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡发出一阵隆隆的低笑，仿佛你刚刚讲了一个荒唐透顶的笑话。{/n}“荒谬，{name}！他就在我眼前，我还能感觉到他就在我体内，他怎么可能已经死了！没错，努恩修斯，我就是这么跟{mf|他|她}说的。你还活着，我们都还活着！这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a rumbling laugh, as if you had told some ridiculous lie.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! How can he be dead if I can see him before me, feel him within me? Yes, Nuncius, that's what I told {mf|him|her} — you are alive, we are both alive! This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡发出一阵隆隆的低笑，仿佛你刚刚讲了一个荒唐透顶的笑话。{/n}“荒谬，{name}！他就在我眼前，我还能感觉到他就在我体内，他怎么可能已经死了！没错，努恩修斯，我就是这么跟{mf|他|她}说的。你还活着，我们都还活着！这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn éclate de rire, comme si vous veniez de dire un mensonge absurde.{/n} « C'est tout bonnement ridicule, {name} ! Comment peut-il être mort alors que je le vois devant moi, que je le sens en moi ? Oui, Nuncius, c'est ce que je lui ai dit. Tu es vivant. Nous sommes vivants tous les deux ! Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a rumbling laugh, as if you had told some ridiculous lie.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! How can he be dead if I can see him before me, feel him within me? Yes, Nuncius, that's what I told {mf|him|her} — you are alive, we are both alive! This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn éclate de rire, comme si vous veniez de dire un mensonge absurde.{/n} « C'est tout bonnement ridicule, {name} ! Comment peut-il être mort alors que je le vois devant moi, que je le sens en moi ? Oui, Nuncius, c'est ce que je lui ai dit. Tu es vivant. Nous sommes vivants tous les deux ! Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, sanki gülünç bir yalan söylemişsin gibi kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Saçmalık! Onu karşımda görebiliyorken, içimde hissedebiliyorken nasıl ölmüş olabilir? Evet Nuncius, ben de öyle söyledim. Sen hayattasın, ikimiz de hayattayız! Bu inkâr edilemez bir gerçek."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a rumbling laugh, as if you had told some ridiculous lie.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! How can he be dead if I can see him before me, feel him within me? Yes, Nuncius, that's what I told {mf|him|her} — you are alive, we are both alive! This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, sanki gülünç bir yalan söylemişsin gibi kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Saçmalık! Onu karşımda görebiliyorken, içimde hissedebiliyorken nasıl ölmüş olabilir? Evet Nuncius, ben de öyle söyledim. Sen hayattasın, ikimiz de hayattayız! Bu inkâr edilemez bir gerçek."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn stößt ein dröhnendes Lachen aus, als hättest du ihm eine lächerliche Lüge aufgetischt.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! Wie kann er tot sein, wenn ich ihn sehen und in mir spüren kann? Ja, Nuncius, das sagte ich {mf|ihm|ihr} — du lebst, das tun wir beide! Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a rumbling laugh, as if you had told some ridiculous lie.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! How can he be dead if I can see him before me, feel him within me? Yes, Nuncius, that's what I told {mf|him|her} — you are alive, we are both alive! This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn stößt ein dröhnendes Lachen aus, als hättest du ihm eine lächerliche Lüge aufgetischt.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! Wie kann er tot sein, wenn ich ihn sehen und in mir spüren kann? Ja, Nuncius, das sagte ich {mf|ihm|ihr} — du lebst, das tun wir beide! Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは、あなたが何かばかげた嘘でもついたかのように、低く響く笑いを漏らす。{/n}「ばかな、{name}！ 私の目の前に彼が見え、私の内に彼を感じられるというのに、どうして彼が死んでいるなどと言えましょう？ そうですとも、ヌンキウス、私が{mf|彼|彼女}にそう言ったのです――君は生きている、我々は二人とも生きているのだと！ これは議論の余地のない事実です」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a rumbling laugh, as if you had told some ridiculous lie.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! How can he be dead if I can see him before me, feel him within me? Yes, Nuncius, that's what I told {mf|him|her} — you are alive, we are both alive! This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは、あなたが何かばかげた嘘でもついたかのように、低く響く笑いを漏らす。{/n}「ばかな、{name}！ 私の目の前に彼が見え、私の内に彼を感じられるというのに、どうして彼が死んでいるなどと言えましょう？ そうですとも、ヌンキウス、私が{mf|彼|彼女}にそう言ったのです――君は生きている、我々は二人とも生きているのだと！ これは議論の余地のない事実です」
